subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Some heedless souls have imagined that the Sun of Truth, when it rose from the horizon of the Temple [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق بعضی بیهوشان چنین گمان نموده اند که شمس حقیقت چون از افق هیکل
subcodes.subjects: @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power of the Manifestation of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Manifestation of God as sun
